response.justification: Strong software engineer with proven leadership and craftsmanship across 20 years, but lacks foundational expertise in the core domain. The role centers on experimentation platforms, growth systems, and metrics/data infrastructure—areas entirely absent from the resume. At Principal level, this domain gap is disqualifying; the candidate would require 6+ months of ramp-up on the critical path.
strengths: Deep software craftsmanship with consistent focus on TDD, testing, and CI/CD across multiple organizations
Demonstrated technical leadership: Staff/Senior roles with mentoring, workshop creation, and multi-team coordination
Modern infrastructure expertise with Kubernetes, AWS, Docker, and full-stack capability (Node.js, TypeScript, React)
concerns: Zero experience building experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, or feature-flagging systems
No background in data analysis, metrics instrumentation, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical methods
Career trajectory focused on product engineering and DevOps infrastructure, not growth or measurement systems
